title: lysimachia reflexiloba
intro: Lysimachia reflexiloba, also known as Huzhang or Chinese Fleece Flower, is a type of flowering plant in the primrose family, native to China and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lysimachia reflexiloba include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as the common cold and flu. Lysimachia reflexiloba is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese herbal remedies to treat a range of health conditions.
